key_themes: Encouraging deep-level drilling results exceeding expectations at Blanket Mine
Confirmation of high-grade mineralization continuity and resource extension at depth
Analyst Buy/Strong Buy ratings with significant price target upside ($28–$47+)
Consistent quarterly dividends and shareholder returns
Solid financial metrics (low PE, strong 1-year returns) ahead of Q1 2026 earnings
summary: Sentiment for CMCL is solidly positive following April 2026 announcements of better-than-expected deep drilling results (high-grade intercepts at Blanket, Eroica, and Lima orebodies) that reinforce resource confidence, support mine-life extension, and will feed into a 2026 resource update. Management highlighted geological strength and continuity at depth. Analysts maintain Buy ratings with targets implying meaningful upside from the ~$26.19 level, supported by a 9.25x PE, $2.83 TTM EPS, ~2.1% dividend yield, and strong longer-term returns (nearly +98% 1-year). Retail/X discussion is thin but uniformly follows the positive corporate news flow, with no major negatives evident ahead of the May 2026 earnings and AGM.
sources: 10+ recent X posts (primarily corporate/news reposts on drilling and dividends), 15+ news/articles from Yahoo Finance, Proactive Investors, MarketBeat, Seeking Alpha equivalents, company releases (drilling updates, dividend, AGM, forecasts)
